description: Augments your outbound chat messages before the agent sees them. A chatPreprocessor stage in the outbound pipeline (match: text): it pulls relevant context — from your CodeTerm memory, a one-shot worker agent, or a Groq model — and folds it into the message as a <context> block. Toggle it off for plain passthrough.
